org.docgene.model.globals

Class ArticlesDictionary

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParent
      • org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesDictionary
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement, org.docgene.model.globals.RootElement, org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement, HTMLOutput, XMLParent

    public class ArticlesDictionary
extends AbstractXMLParent
implements HTMLOutput, org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement
    Maintains the dictionary of articles sorted by their first letter.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  ArticlesDictionary.Letter
      Represents one Letter in the dictionnary.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParent

        keepCase - true if the letter case should be kept
